Source.Name: akonadi
Source.Description: akonadi is an extensible cross-desktop storage service for PIM data and meta data providing concurrent read, write, and query access.
Akonadi, PIM verisi ve meta veriler için eşzamanlı okuma, yazma ve sorgulama yapma imkanı sağlayan, masaüstü ortamından bağımsız, genişletilebilir bir depolama servisidir.

Source.Name: akonadi-calendar
Source.Description: Calendar integration for Akonadi.

Source.Name: akonadi-calendar-tools
Source.Summary: CLI tools to manage akonadi calendars
Source.Description: CLI tools to manage akonadi calendars

Package.Name: akonadi-calendar-tools
Package.Summary: CLI tools to manage akonadi calendars

Source.Name: akonadi-contacts
Source.Summary: Libraries and daemons to implement Contact Management in Akonadi.
Source.Description: Libraries and daemons to implement Contact Management in Akonadi.

Source.Name: akonadi-import-wizard
Source.Summary: CLI tools to manage akonadi calendars
Source.Description: Import data from other mail clients to kmail

Package.Name: akonadi-import-wizard
Package.Summary: Import data from other mail clients to kmail

Source.Name: akonadi-mime
Source.Summary: Libraries and daemons to implement basic email handling
Source.Description: Libraries and daemons to implement basic email handling

Source.Name: akonadi-search
Source.Summary: Libraries and daemons to implement searching in Akonadi
Source.Description: Libraries and daemons to implement searching in Akonadi

Source.Name: akonadiconsole
Source.Description: Akonadi management and debugging console

Source.Name: akregator
Source.Description: akregator helps you to keep informed about new stories on websites like KDE Dot News and Planet KDE blogs. The technology used is RSS and many sites support it.

Source.Name: analitza
Source.Summary: A KDE library for mathematical features
Matematiksel özellikler için bir KDE kitaplığı
Source.Description: analitza is a library to add mathematical features to programs.
analitza, programlara matematiksel özellikler eklemek için bir kitaplıktır.

Source.Name: ark
Source.Description: Ark is a program for managing various archive formats within the KDE environment.

Source.Name: artikulate
Source.Summary: Improve your pronunciation by listening to native speakers
Source.Description: artikulate5, Improve your pronunciation by listening to native speakers.

Source.Name: audex
Source.Description: Audex creates profiles for LAME, Ogg Vorbis (oggenc), FLAC, MP4/M4A/AAC (faac) and RIFF WAVE. Please install your favorite encoder. For WAVE no external encoder is needed. Beyond you can define custom profile, which means, that Audex works together with commmand line encoders in general.

Audeks bir ses CD’si aktarıcısı uygulamadır. CD’lerinizden sesleri çıkarmanıza ve onları bilgisayarınızda veya başka bir aygıtınızda dinlemenize olanak tanır. Kullanılabiliyorsa CD’lerinizin kapak bilgisini ve sanatçı/şarkı üst verisini almanızı sağlamak için CDDB ve MusicBrainz tümleştirmesi sunar.

Source.Name: audiocd-kio
Source.Description: kioslave for accessing audio CDs

Source.Name: baloo-widgets
Source.Summary: Framework for searching and managing metadata
Source.Description: Baloo is a framework for searching and managing metada

Source.Name: blinken
Source.Description: blinken is based on an electronic game released in 1978, which challenges players to remember sequences of increasing length. On the face of the device, there are 4 different color buttons, each one with their own distinctive sound.
Hafıza geliştirme oyunu.

Source.Name: bomber
Source.Description: bomber is a single player arcade game. The player is invading various cities in a plane that is decreasing in height.

Source.Name: bovo
Source.Summary: A Gomoku like game for two players.
Source.Description: bovo is a Gomoku like game for two players, where the opponents alternate in placing their respective pictogram on the game board.

Source.Name: cantor
Source.Summary: A KDE frontend to mathematical softwares
Matematiksel uygulamalar için bir KDE önyüzü
Source.Description: cantor is an application that lets you use your favorite mathematical applications from within a nice KDE-integrated Worksheet Interface. It offers assistant dialogs for common tasks and allows you to share your worksheets with others.

cantor; Sage, Maxima, R and kalgebra gibi uygulamalara arayüz sağlayarak kullanımı kolaylaştırmayı amaçlar. Çok kullanılan işler için dialoglar sağlar ve çalışmalarınızı başkalarıyla paylaşabilmenize olanak tanır.

Source.Name: dolphin
Source.Description: dolphin is the File Manager for KDE.

Source.Name: dolphin-plugins
Source.Description: This package contains plugins that offer integration in dolphin with the following version control systems:
dolphin için VCS (Version Control System) eklentileri.

Source.Name: dragonplayer
Source.Description: a multimedia player where the focus is on simplicity, instead of features.

Source.Name: drawy
Source.Description: Drawy lets you create ideas, diagrams, and visual notes on an endless whiteboard with a fluid and responsive canvas. With pressure-sensitive tablet support, you can draw, add text, add images, and use basic shapes like rectangles, ellipses, arrows, and lines to clearly organize your content.

Drawy, akıcı ve duyarlı bir tuval üzerinde sonsuz bir beyaz tahtada fikirler, diyagramlar ve görsel notlar oluşturmanıza olanak tanır. Basınca duyarlı tablet desteğiyle çizim yapabilir, metin ekleyebilir, görseller ekleyebilir ve içeriğinizi net bir şekilde düzenlemek için dikdörtgenler, elipsler, oklar ve çizgiler gibi temel şekilleri kullanabilirsiniz.

Source.Name: eventviews
Source.Description: Library for creating events.

Source.Name: falkon
Source.Description: falkon is a new and very fast QtWebEngine browser
falkon is a new and very fast QtWebEngine browser

Source.Name: ffmpegthumbs
Source.Description: FFmpeg-based thumbnail creator for video files
Video dosyaları için FFmpeg tabanlı önizleme oluşturur.

Source.Name: filelight
Source.Description: filelight allows you to quickly understand exactly where your diskspace is being used by graphically representing your file system as a set of concentric segmented-rings.
filelight allows you to quickly understand exactly where your diskspace is being used by graphically representing your file system as a set of concentric segmented-rings.

Source.Name: granatier
Source.Description: granatier is a clone of the classic bomberman game, inspired by the work of the Clanbomber clone.
granatier, oyuncunun yüksekliği her turda azalan bir uçak içinde şehirlere hücum ettiği tek kişilik bir macera oyunudur.

Source.Name: grantlee-editor
Source.Description: Editor for Grantlee themes

Source.Name: grantleetheme
Source.Description: Library for Grantlee theming support

Package.Name: grantleetheme-devel
Package.Description: Contains development tools and header files for grantleetheme

Source.Name: gwenview
Source.Description: gwenview is an easy to use image viewer
gwenview, kullanımı kolay bir resim görüntüleyicisidir.

Source.Name: incidenceeditor
Source.Description: KDE PIM incidence editor.

Source.Name: kaccounts-integration
Source.Summary: Small system to administer web accounts for the sites and services across the KDE desktop, including: Google, Facebook, Owncloud, IMAP, Jabber and others
Source.Description: Small system to administer web accounts for the sites and services across the KDE desktop, including: Google, Facebook, Owncloud, IMAP, Jabber and others

Package.Name: kaccounts-integration
Package.Summary: Small system to administer web accounts for the sites and services across the KDE desktop, including: Google, Facebook, Owncloud, IMAP, Jabber and others

Source.Name: kaccounts-providers
Source.Summary: Small system to administer web accounts for the sites and services across the KDE desktop, including: Google, Facebook, Owncloud, IMAP, Jabber and others
Source.Description: Small system to administer web accounts for the sites and services across the KDE desktop, including: Google, Facebook, Owncloud, IMAP, Jabber and others

Package.Name: kaccounts-providers
Package.Summary: Small system to administer web accounts for the sites and services across the KDE desktop, including: Google, Facebook, Owncloud, IMAP, Jabber and others

Source.Name: kaddressbook
Source.Description: kaddressbook reborn to make your data available to all your applications

kaddressbook, kişilerinizi kolayca yönetmenizi sağlar. Bir e-posta gönderirken veya bir toplantı daveti oluştururken kolayca kişileri seçmenize olanak tanıyan kontact'ın geri kalanıyla derinlemesine entegre edilmiştir.

Source.Name: kalarm
Source.Description: kalarm is a personal alarm message, audio, command and email scheduler

Source.Name: kalgebra
Source.Description: kalgebra is a fully featured calculator that lets you plot different types of 2D and 3D functions and to calculate easy and not so easy calculations, such as addition, trigonometric functions or derivatives.
kalgebra, farklı farklı 2B ve 3B fonksiyonları çizmek, kolay ve o kadar da kolay olmayan trigonometrik veya türev gibi hesaplamaları yapmak için bir uygulamadır.

Source.Name: kamera
Source.Description: kamera is a plugin for KDE to use webcam.
kamera, KDE için bir web kamera eklentisidir.

Source.Name: kamoso
Source.Summary: A webcam recorder from KDE community
KDE topluluğundan bir web kamerası kaydedici
Source.Description: Application to take pictures and videos with your webcam
Web kameranızla fotoğraf ve video çekmek için uygulama

Source.Name: kanagram
Source.Description: kanagram is a game based on anagrams of words: the puzzle is solved when the letters of the scrambled word are put back in the correct order. There is no limit on either time taken, or the amount of attempts to solve the word.
kanagram, anagramlar üzerine bir oyundur. Dağınık yerleştirilmiş harfleri birleştirerek kelimeyi bulun. Zaman veya deneme sınırı yoktur.

Source.Name: kapman
Source.Description: kapman is a clone of the well known game Pac-Man. You must go through the levels escaping ghosts in a maze. You lose a life when a ghost eats you, but you can eat the ghosts for a few seconds when eating an energizer.

kapman dünyaca ünlü Pac-Man'in bir türevidir. Labirent içinde hayaletlerle köşe kapmaca oynayarak bölümleri geçmeye çalıştığınız oyunda eğer hayaletlere yakalanırsanız bir hakkınızı kaybediyorsunuz. Eğer bir enerji nesnesi alırsanız bu kez siz bir kaç saniyeliğine hayaletleri yiyebiliyorsunuz.

Source.Name: kapptemplate
Source.Description: kapptemplate is a shell script that will create the necessary framework to develop several types of applications, including applications based on the KDE development platform.
kapptemplate, çeşitli uygulamaları geliştirmek için gerekli olabilecek şablonlar oluşturmayı sağlar.

Source.Name: kate
Source.Description: Plasma library and runtime components based upon KF5 and Qt5

Source.Name: katomic
Source.Description: katomic is both fun and educational game built around molecular geometry.
katomic moleküler geometri hakkında hem eğlenceli hem de eğitici bir oyundur.

Source.Name: kblackbox
Source.Description: kblackbox is a game of hide and seek played on a grid of boxes. The computer has hidden several balls within this box. By shooting beams into the box and observing where they emerge it is possible to deduce the positions of the hidden balls.
kblackbox yan yana dizilmiş kutularla oynanan bir saklambaç oyunudur. Bilgisayarın sakladığı topları kutuları lazerle kontrol ederek bulabilirsiniz.

Source.Name: kblocks
Source.Description: kblocks is the classic falling blocks game. The idea is stack the falling blocks in a way that lines are completely filled. When a line is completed it is removed, and more space is available in the play area. When there is not enough space for blocks to fall, the game is over.

kblocks klasikleşmiş tetrisin bir yeniden yapımıdır. Oyunun amacı düşen parçaları en uygun şekilde dizmektir. Bir satır tamamen dolduktan sonra silinmektedir ve daha fazla oyun alanı açılmaktadır. Yeni parçaları koyacak yeriniz kalmadığında oyun bitmektedir.

Source.Name: kbounce
Source.Description: kbounce is a single player arcade game with the elements of puzzle. It is played on a field, surrounded by walls, with two or more balls that move about in the field bouncing off of walls. The player can build new walls, decreasing the size of the active field. The goal of the game is to fill at least 75% of the field and advance to the next level.

kbounce, Volfied'in oynaniş tarzına benzeyen tek kişilik bir bulmaca - macera oyunudur. Oyuncu iki veya daha fazla topun oradan oraya zıpladığı duvarlarla kaplı bir alanda yeni duvarlar inşa ederek ve toplara yakalanmamaya çalışarak aktif alanın en azından %75'ini kapatmaya çalışmaktadır.

Source.Name: kbreakout
Source.Description: kbreakout is a Breakout like game. The object of the game is to destroy as many bricks as possible without losing the ball.
kbreakout bir Breakout türevidir. Oyunun amacı topları yere düşürmeden olabildiğince çok tuğlayı yok etmektir.

Source.Name: kbruch
Source.Summary: Practice calculating with fractions and percentages
Ondalık ve kesirli sayılarla pratik yapın
Source.Description: kbruch is a small program to practice calculating with fractions and percentages. Different exercises are provided for this purpose and you can use the learning mode to practice with fractions. The program checks the user's input and gives feedback.
kbruch, ondalık ve kesirli sayılar üzerine işlemleri öğrenmeye ve egzersiz yapmaya yarayan bir uygulamadır.

Source.Name: kcalc
Source.Description: kcalc is a calculator which offers many more mathematical functions than meet the eye on a first glance.
kcalc, pek çok matematik fonksiyonu barındıran bir hesap makinesi uygulamasıdır.

Source.Name: kcalutils
Source.Description: Calendar utility library for KDE

Source.Name: kcharselect
Source.Description: kcharselect is a tool to select special characters from all installed fonts and copy them into the clipboard.
kcharselect, tüm yüklü yazı tiplerinden özel karakterleri seçmek ve bunları panoya yapıştırmak için bir araçtır.

Source.Name: kcolorchooser
Source.Description: kcolorchooser is a simple color chooser application.
kcolorchooser, basit bir renk seçme uygulamasıdır.

Source.Name: kcron
Source.Description: kcron is a graphical frontend to the cron system, used to schedule regular tasks on a Unix system.
kcron, cron görev zamanlayıcı altyapısının bir arayüzüdür.

Source.Name: kdb
Source.Summary: A database connectivity and creation framework for various database vendors.
Çeşitli veritabanı üreticileri için veritabanı bağlantısı oluşturma çerçevesi.
Source.Description: A database connectivity and creation framework for various database vendors

Package.Name: kdb
Package.Summary: A database connectivity and creation framework for various database vendors.

Source.Name: kde-dev-scripts
Source.Summary: Scripts and setting files useful during development of KDE software
Source.Description: Scripts and setting files useful during development of KDE software

Package.Name: kde-dev-scripts
Package.Summary: Scripts and setting files useful during development of KDE software

Source.Name: kdebugsettings
Source.Description: KDebug control module for KDE. It provides a graphical frontend for the kdebug daemon, which allow enabling or disabling particular debug areas/messages.

Source.Name: kdeconnect
Source.Description: Connect KDE with your smartphone
Cihazlarınızı KDE ile birleştirin

Source.Name: kdeedu-data
Source.Summary: Common data for KDE Edu applications
Source.Description: Common data for KDE Edu applications.

Source.Name: kdegraphics-mobipocket
Source.Summary: A collection of plugins to handle mobipocket files
A library to handle mobipocket files
Source.Description: A collection of plugins to handle mobipocket files
A library to handle mobipocket files

Package.Name: kdegraphics-mobipocket
Package.Summary: A collection of plugins to handle mobipocket files

Source.Name: kdegraphics-svgpart
Source.Description: A KPart for viewing SVGs

Source.Name: kdegraphics-thumbnailers
Source.Description: kdegraphics-thumbnailers contains thumbnail-related libraries.
kdegraphics-thumbnailers, önizleme kitaplıklarını içerir.

Source.Name: kdenetwork-filesharing
Source.Description: Filesharing configuration modlue.
Dosya paylaşım konfigürasyon modülü.

Source.Name: kdenlive
Source.Summary: A video editing GUI for KDE using the MLT video framework
MLT video yapısı kullanan, KDE için bir video düzenleme uygulaması
Source.Description: kdenlive est multi-piste, gère une liste de clips et gère les doubles moniteurs vidéos. Il fournit également entre autres un support de couches personnalisables ainsi que des effets et des transitions de base.
kdenlive provides dual video monitors, a multi-track timeline and clip list. Other features include customizable layout support, basic effects and transitions.
kdenlive, ikili video izleyicileri, çoklu parça zaman çizelgesi ve klip listesi sunmaktadır. Diğer özellikler arasında özelleştirilebilir düzenleme desteği, temel efektler ve geçişler sayılabilir.
kdenlive jest nieliniowym pakietem do edycji wideo obsługującym DV, HDC i wiele innych formatów.

Source.Name: kdepim-addons
Source.Summary: Addons for the KDE PIM apllications
Source.Description: Addons for the KDE PIM apllications

Package.Name: kdepim-addons
Package.Summary: Addons for the KDE PIM apllications

Source.Name: kdepim-runtime
Source.Summary: kde6 PIM (Kişisel Bilgi Yönetimi) çalışma zamanı ortamı
Source.Description: kdepim-runtime contains kde6 PIM (Personal Information Management) runtime environment like akonadi agents.
kdepim-runtime, kdelibs kullanarak yazılmış olan Akonadi ajanları da dahil olmak üzere kde6 PIM (Personal Information Management - Kişisel Bilgi Yönetimi) çalışma zamanı ortamını içerir.

Source.Name: kdesdk-thumbnailers
Source.Description: Translation file thumbnail generators

Source.Name: kdf
Source.Description: KDiskFree displays the available file devices (hard drive partitions, floppy and CD drives, etc.) along with information on their capacity, free space, type and mount point. It also allows you to mount and unmount drives and view them in a file manager.

Source.Name: kdiagram
Source.Summary: Powerful libraries for creating business diagrams
Source.Description: Powerful libraries for creating business diagrams

Package.Name: kdiagram
Package.Summary: Powerful libraries for creating business diagrams

Source.Name: kdialog
Source.Summary: kdialog allows you to display dialog boxes from shell scripts
Source.Description: The syntax is very much inspired from the "dialog" command (which shows text mode dialogs).

Package.Name: kdialog
Package.Summary: kdialog allows you to display dialog boxes from shell scripts

Source.Name: kdiamond
Source.Description: kdiamond is a single player puzzle game. The object of the game is to build lines of three similar diamonds.
kdiamond benzer elmaslardan üç tanesinin yan yana getirilmesini konu edinen tek kişilik bir bulmaca oyunudur.

Source.Name: keditbookmarks
Source.Description: Bookmark Organizer and Editor

Source.Name: kfind
Source.Description: Find Files/Folders

Source.Name: kfourinline
Source.Summary: Four in a row board game
Source.Description: kfourinline is a board game for two players based on the Connect-Four game.
kfourinline iki kişiyle oynanan Hedef 4 türevi bir oyundur.

Source.Name: calendarsupport
Source.Description: Calendar support library

Source.Name: kalzium
Source.Description: Elementlerin periyodik tablosu
Elementlerin periyodik tablosu

Source.Name: kdeaudio-thumbnailer
Source.Summary: Thumbnail generator for audio files, ported to KF5
Source.Description: Thumbnail generator for audio files, ported to KF5

Package.Name: kdeaudio-thumbnailer
Package.Summary: Thumbnail generator for audio files, ported to KF5

Source.Name: kgeography
Source.Summary: kgeography is a geography learning tool
Source.Description: kgeography is a geography learning tool, which allows you to learn about the political divisions of some countries (divisions, capitals of those divisions and their associated flags if there are some).
kgeography, ülkeler hakkında çeşitli bilgiler sunan bir coğrafya uygulamasıdır.

Source.Name: klickety
Source.Description: klickety is a kind of solitary game that takes place on a Tetris-like board.
klickety Tetris gibi tahta üzerinde yer alan bir tür soliter oyunu

Source.Name: konversation
Source.Summary: A user friendly IRC client for KDE
Source.Description: konversation is a user-friendly Internet Relay Chat (IRC) client built on the KDE Platform.

Source.Name: kteatime
Source.Description: kteatime is a handy timer for steeping tea. No longer will you have to guess at how long it takes for your tea to be ready.
kteatime çay yapmak için kullanışlı bir uygulamadır. kteatime ile çay demlemek için ne kadar beklemek gerektiğini düşünmenize gerek kalmaz.

Source.Name: libkomparediff2
Source.Summary: Library to compare files and strings
Source.Description: Library to compare files and strings

Source.Name: kget
Source.Description: kget is an advanced download manager with support for Metalink and Bittorrent.
kget, Metalink ve BitTorrent desteği olan bir indirme yöneticisidir.

Source.Name: kgpg
Source.Summary: A QtQuick plugin to render beautiful and interactive charts
Source.Description: kgpg is a simple interface for GnuPG, a powerful encryption utility.

Source.Name: khangman
Source.Summary: khangman is a game for kids based on the well-known hangman game
Adam asmaca oyununun çocuklar için uyarlanmış, öğretici versiyonu
Source.Description: khangman is a game based on the well-known hangman game. It is aimed at children aged six and over. The game has several categories of words to play with, for example: Animals (animals words) and three difficulty categories: Easy, Medium and Hard.
khangman, adam asmaca olarak bilinen oyunun 6 yaş ve üzeri için uyarlanmış bir uygulamasıdır. Oynamak için seçilebilecek değişik kategoriler ve 3 farklı zorluk seviyesi bulunuyor.

Source.Name: khelpcenter
Source.Description: KDE help center utility to read help documentation about various KDE applications.

Source.Name: kidentitymanagement
Source.Description: Library for the KDE-PIM(Personal-Infomation-Management

Source.Name: kig
Source.Description: kig5 is an application for interactive geometry.

Source.Name: killbots
Source.Description: killbots is a simple game of evading killer robots. Who created the robots and why they have been programmed to destroy, no one knows. All that is known is that the robots are numerous and their sole objective is to destroy you.

killbots katil robotlardan kaçmaya çalıştığınız basit bir oyundur. Robotların kimin tarafından yaratıldığı veya neden yok etmek için programlandığı bilinmiyor. Tek gerçek şu ki bir çok robot var ve tek amaçları sizi yok etmek.

Source.Name: kimap
Source.Summary: Job-based API for interacting with IMAP servers
Source.Description: API for interacting with IMAP servers

Source.Name: kio-admin
Source.Summary: Manage files as administrator using the admin:// kio protocol
Manage files as administrator using the admin:// kio protocol
Source.Description: Admin:// kio protokolünü kullanarak dosyaları yönetici olarak yönetin
Admin:// kio protokolünü kullanarak dosyaları yönetici olarak yönetin

Source.Name: kio-extras
Source.Description: Additional kio-slaves for kde6 applications

Source.Name: kio-gdrive
Source.Summary: Provides support for secure credentials storage
Google Drive'a erişmek için kio Slave
Source.Description: kio Slave to access Google Drive
Google Drive'a erişmek için kio Slave

Package.Name: kio-gdrive
Package.Summary: kio Slave to access Google Drive

Source.Name: kio-zeroconf
Source.Description: DNS-SD hizmetleri için Ağ İzleyicisi

Source.Name: kiriki
Source.Description: kiriki is an addictive and fun dice game for KDE, designed to be played by as many as six players.
kiriki KDE için alışkanlık yapan ve eğlenceli bir zar oyunudur. Altı oyuncuya kadar birlikte oynanabilir.

Source.Name: kiten
Source.Description: kiten is a Japanese reference/study tool.
kiten, Japonca referans ve alıştırma uygulamasıdır.

Source.Name: kitinerary
Source.Summary: Data model and extraction system for travel reservation information
Data model and extraction system for travel reservation information
Source.Description: Seyahat rezervasyon bilgisi için veri modeli ve ekstraksiyon sistemi
Seyahat rezervasyon bilgisi için veri modeli ve ekstraksiyon sistemi

Source.Name: kjumpingcube
Source.Description: kjumpingcube is a simple tactical game.
kjumpingcube basit bir taktik oyunudur.

Source.Name: kldap
Source.Description: Allows LDAP accessing with a convenient Qt style C++ API.

Source.Name: kleopatra
Source.Summary: Certificate Manager and Unified Crypto GUI
Source.Description: kleopatra is a certificate manager and a universal crypto GUI. It supports managing X.509 and OpenPGP certificates in the GpgSM keybox and retrieving certificates from LDAP servers.

Package.Name: kleopatra
Package.Summary: Certificate Manager and Unified Crypto GUI

Source.Name: klettres
Source.Description: klettres is an application specially designed to help the user to learn alphabet in a new language and then to learn to read simple syllables. The user can be a young child aged from two and a half or an adult that wants to learn the basics of a foreign language.

klettres, kullanıcının yeni bir alfabeyi ve basit sesli sözleri öğrenmesi için geliştirilmiş bir uygulamadır. İki buçuk yaşındaki bir çocuk için yararlı olabileceği gibi, yeni bir dil öğrenen yetişkinler için de yardımcı olabilir.

Source.Name: klines
Source.Description: Kolor Lines is a simple but highly addictive, one player game for KDE. Kolor Lines has been inspired by well known game of Color Lines. The goal of Kolor Lines is quite plain. The player has to move the colored balls around the game board, gathering them into the lines of the same color by five.
Kolor Lines basit ama bağımlılık yapıcı bir oyundur. Dünyaca ünlü Color Lines'tan esinlenilen oyunda amacınız aynı renkli toplardan beş tanesini yan yana getirmektir.

Source.Name: kmahjongg
Source.Description: kmahjongg is a fun board game created after the famous oriental game of Mahjong. Unlike the original however, kmahjongg is a tile matching game for one or two players, a variation usually known as Mahjong Solitaire.
Mahjong Solitaire oyununa benzer kmahjongg bir veya iki oyuncunun birlekte oynayabileceği bir parça eşleştirme oyunudur.

Source.Name: kmail
Source.Description: kmail is the email component of kontact, the integrated personal information manager from KDE.

Source.Name: kmail-account-wizard
Source.Description: kmail Account Wizard

Source.Name: kmailtransport
Source.Description: Mail Transport Service

Source.Name: kmbox
Source.Description: MBox library support.

Source.Name: kmines
Source.Description: kmines is the classic Minesweeper game. The idea is to uncover all the squares without blowing up any mines. When a mine is blown up, the game is over.
kmines klasik mayın tarlası oyununun bir türevidir. Oyunun amacı hiç bir mayına denk gelmemeye çalışarak kutuları açmaktır. Eğer bir mayın patlarsa oyun biter.

Source.Name: kmix
Source.Description: kmix: KDE Digital Mixer
kmix: KDE için Dijital Mixer.

Source.Name: kmplot
Source.Description: kmplot is a program to draw graphs, their integrals or derivatives. It supports different systems of coordinates like the Cartesian or the polar coordinate system. The graphs can be colorized and the view is scalable, so that you are able to zoom to the level you need.

Source.Name: knavalbattle
Source.Description: knavalbattle is a Battle Ship game for KDE. Ships are placed on a board which represents the sea. Players try to hit each others ships in turns without knowing where they are placed. The first player to destroy all ships wins the game.

KBattleship KDE için bir Amiral Battı oyunudur. Gemiler denizi temsil eden oyun tahtasına yerleştirilir ve oyuncular rakiplerinin gemilerinin yerleşimini tahmin ederek gemileri vurmaya çalışır. Rakibinin tüm gemilerini daha önce batıran oyuncu kazanır.

Source.Name: knetwalk
Source.Description: knetwalk is a single player logic game. The object of the game is to start the LAN, connecting all the terminals to the server, in as few turns as possible.
knetwalk bir ağ kurma oyunudur. Dunucularla istemcileri mümkün olan en az kaynakla birleştirmeye çalışmak oyunun amacıdır. Bağımlılık yapması olasıdır.

Source.Name: kollision
Source.Description: kollision is ball dodging game. Click on the empty field to start a game: a blue ball immediately replaces your mouse cursor, and a number of red balls start to fade into the field.

kollision basit bir top sıçratma oyunudur. Boş bir alana fareyle tıkladığınızda oyun başlar ve fare imlecinizin yerini mavi bir top alır, ayrıca olayların gelişmesine vesile olacak kırmızı toplar da alandaki yerlerini alırlar.

Source.Name: kolourpaint
Source.Summary: An easy to use paint program
Source.Description: kolourpaint is a simple painting program to quickly create raster images. It is useful as a touch-up tool and simple image editing tasks.
kolourpaint, kullanımı kolay bir çizim programıdır.

Source.Name: kompare
Source.Description: Diff/Patch Frontend.
Dosya karşılaştırma göstericisi.

Source.Name: konqueror
Source.Summary: konqueror - KDE File Manager and Web Browser
Source.Description: konqueror is KDE's Webbrowser and swiss-army-knife for any kind of file-management and file previewing.

Package.Name: konqueror
Package.Summary: konqueror - KDE File Manager and Web Browser

Source.Name: konsole
Source.Description: konsole for kde6

Source.Name: kontact
Source.Description: kontact is the integrated Personal Information Manager of KDE, but can be used with other systems as well. It supports email, address books, calendars, tasks, news feeds and much more.

Source.Name: kontactinterface
Source.Description: This library provides the glue necessary for application "Parts" to be embedded as a kontact component (or plugin).

Source.Name: korganizer
Source.Description: korganizer is the calendar and scheduling component of kontact, the integrated personal information manager from KDE.

Source.Name: kpat
Source.Description: To play kpatience you need, as the name suggests, patience. For simple games, where the way the game goes depends only upon how the cards fall, your patience might be the only thing you need.

Source.Name: kpimtextedit
Source.Description: Text Edit with KDE-PIM specific features.

Source.Name: kpkpass
Source.Description: Apple Cüzdan Geçiş okuyucusu
Apple Cüzdan Geçiş okuyucusu

Source.Name: kpmcore
Source.Description: KPMcore, the KDE Partition Manager core, is a library for examining and modifying partitions, disk devices, and filesystems on a Linux system. It provides a unified programming interface over top of (external) system-manipulation tools.

Source.Name: kproperty
Source.Summary: A property editing framework with editor widget similar to what is known from Qt Designer
Source.Description: A property editing framework with editor widget similar to what is known from Qt Designer

Package.Name: kproperty
Package.Summary: A property editing framework with editor widget similar to what is known from Qt Designer

Source.Name: kqtquickcharts
Source.Summary: A QtQuick plugin to render beautiful and interactive charts
Source.Description: A QtQuick plugin to render beautiful and interactive charts

Package.Name: kqtquickcharts
Package.Summary: A QtQuick plugin to render beautiful and interactive charts

Source.Name: krdc
Source.Description: krdc is a client application that allows you to view or even control the desktop session on another machine that is running a compatible server. VNC and RDP is supported.
krdc, uzaktaki bir masaüstü oturumunu görüntülemenizi ve kontrol etmenizi sağlar. RDP kullanan Windows Terminal Sunucuları'na ve VNC/RFB kullanan diğer pek çok platforma bağlanabilirç

Source.Name: kreport
Source.Summary: A framework for creation and generation of reports in multiple formats
Source.Description: A framework for creation and generation of reports in multiple formats

Package.Name: kreport
Package.Summary: A framework for creation and generation of reports in multiple formats

Source.Name: krfb
Source.Description: KDE Desktop Sharing is a manager for easily sharing a desktop session with another system. The desktop session can be viewed or controlled remotely by any VNC or RFB client
krfb, masaüstünü uzaktaki bilgisayarlarla kolaylıkla paylaşmaya olanak sağlar.

Source.Name: kross-interpreters
Source.Summary: kross5 interpreter plugins for programming languages
Source.Description: Language interpreters to enable in-process scripting with kross5.

Source.Name: kruler
Source.Summary: A screen ruler and color measurement tool
Ekran cetveli ve renk ölçüm aracı
Source.Description: kruler is a screen ruler and color measurement tool.
kruler, bir ekran cetveli ve renk ölçüm aracıdır.

Source.Name: ksanecore
Source.Summary: Library providing logic to interface scanners
Library providing logic to interface scanners
Source.Description: Library providing logic to interface scanners
Library providing logic to interface scanners

Source.Name: kshisen
Source.Description: Shisen-Sho is a solitaire-like game played using the standard set of Mahjong tiles. Unlike Mahjong however, Shisen-Sho has only one layer of scrambled tiles.

Source.Name: ksmtp
Source.Summary: Bir SMTP sunucusu yoluyla e-posta göndermek için işe dayalı kütüphane
Bir SMTP sunucusu yoluyla e-posta göndermek için işe dayalı kütüphane
Source.Description: Job-based library to send email through an SMTP server
Job-based library to send email through an SMTP server

Source.Name: ksquares
Source.Summary: Connect the dots to create squares
Source.Description: ksquares is a fun and exciting game that modeled after the well known pen and paper based game of Dots and Boxes.
ksquares sıkıcı derslerin kurtarıcısı, eğlenceli ve heyecanlı kare yapma oyununun KDE sürümüdür.

Source.Name: kstars
Source.Description: KStars is a Desktop Planetarium for KDE. It provides an accurate graphical simulation of the night sky, from any location on Earth, at any date and time. The display includes up to 100 million stars, 13,000 deep-sky objects, all 8 planets, the Sun and Moon, and thousands of comets and asteroids.

KStars, dünyanın herhangi bir yerinin herhangi bir anındaki gökyüzü yıldız haritasını gösterebilen bir uygulamadır. 100 milyon kadar yıldız, 13000 derin gök cismi, 8 gezegenin tümü, Güneş, Ay ile birçok kuyruklu yıldız ve astreoidi içeren bir veritabanı vardır.

Source.Name: ksudoku
Source.Description: ksudoku is a logic-based symbol placement puzzle.
ksudoku mantık temelli bir sembol yerleştirme oyunudur.

Source.Name: ksystemlog
Source.Description: ksystemlog show all logs of your system, grouped by General (Default system log, Authentication, Kernel, X.org...), and optional Services (Apache, Cups, etc, ...).
ksystemlog, sistemin bütün hata kayıtlarını (genel ve opsiyonel) görüntülemmeye yarayan bir uygulamadır.

Source.Name: ktimer
Source.Description: ktimer is a little tool to execute programs after some time. It allows you to enter several tasks and to set a timer for each of them. The timers for each task can be started, stopped, changed, or looped.

ktimer is a little tool to execute programs after some time. It allows you to enter several tasks and to set a timer for each of them. The timers for each task can be started, stopped, changed, or looped.

Source.Name: ktnef
Source.Description: The API permits access to the actual attachments, the message properties (TNEF/MAPI), and allows one to view/extract message formatted text in Rich Text Format format.

Source.Name: ktorrent
Source.Summary: A powerful BitTorrent client for KDE
KDE için güçlü bir BitTorrent istemcisi
Source.Description: A powerful BitTorrent client for KDE
KDE için güçlü bir BitTorrent istemcisi

Source.Name: ktuberling
Source.Summary: A simple constructor game suitable for children and adults alike
Source.Description: ktuberling a simple constructor game suitable for children and adults alike. The idea of the game is based around a once popular doll making concept.

Package.Name: ktuberling
Package.Summary: A simple constructor game suitable for children and adults alike

Source.Name: kturtle
Source.Description: kturtle is an educational programming environment that aims to make learning how to program as easily as possible. To achieve this kturtle makes all programming tools available from the user interface. The programming language used is TurtleScript which allows its commands to be translated.

kturtle, programlama öğrenmeyi olabildiğince kolaylaştırmak için tasarlanmış bir programlama uygulamasıdır. Bu amaçla tasarlanan arayüz tüm gerekli araçları kullanıcıya sunar. Ayrıca kullanılan programlama dili olan TurtleScript başka dillere çevrilebilen bir yapıya sahiptir.

Source.Name: kwalletmanager
Source.Description: kwalletmanager is a tool to manage the passwords on your system. By using the KDE wallet subsystem it not only allows you to keep your own secrets but also to access and manage the passwords of every application that integrates with the wallet.

Source.Name: kwave
Source.Description: With kwave you can record, play back, import and edit many sorts of audio files including multi channel files.kwave includes some plugins to transform audio files in several ways and presents a graphical view with a complete zoom- and scroll capability.

Source.Name: kwordquiz
Source.Summary: kwordquiz is a Flash Card Trainer
Source.Description: kwordquiz is a tool that gives you a powerful way to master new vocabularies. It may be a language or any other kind of terminology..

Source.Name: libgravatar
Source.Summary: KDE PIM library providing Gravatar support
Source.Description: KDE PIM library providing Gravatar support

Source.Name: libkcddb
Source.Summary: KDE library for CDDB (Compact Disc Database)
CDDB için KDE kitaplığı (Compact Disc Database)
Source.Description: KDE library for CDDB (Compact Disc Database).
CDDB için KDE kitaplığı (Compact Disc Database).

Source.Name: libkcompactdisc
Source.Summary: A library for interfacing with CDs
Source.Description: A library for interfacing with CDs

Package.Name: libkcompactdisc
Package.Summary: A library for interfacing with CDs

Source.Name: libkdcraw
Source.Summary: A C++ interface around LibRaw library
Source.Description: libkdcraw is a C++ interface around LibRaw library used to decode RAW picture files.
libkdcraw, RAW resim dosyalarını çözmek için kullanılan LibRaW kitaplığının C++ arayüzüdür.

Source.Name: libkdegames
Source.Summary: Common code and data for many KDE games
Source.Description: Common code and data for many KDE games

Source.Name: libkdepim
Source.Description: Libraries for KDE PIM applications

Source.Name: libkeduvocdocument
Source.Summary: Common libraries for KDE Edu applications
Source.Description: Libraries for KDE EDU applications.

Source.Name: libkexiv2
Source.Description: libkexiv2 is a wrapper around Exiv2 library to manipulate pictures metadata as EXIF/IPTC and XMP.
libkexiv2, EXIF/IPTC ve XMP gibi resim meta bilgilerini düzenlemek için kullanılan Exiv2 kitaplığını sarmalayan bir kitaplıktır.

Source.Name: libkgapi
Source.Description: A KDE-based library for accessing various Google services via their public API

Source.Name: libkleo
Source.Description: KDE PIM cryptographic library

Package.Name: libkleo-devel
Package.Description: Contains development tools and header files for libkleo

Source.Name: libkmahjongg
Source.Summary: Common code, backgrounds and tile sets for games using Mahjongg tiles
Source.Description: Common code, backgrounds and tile sets for games using Mahjongg tiles.

Source.Name: libksane
Source.Description: libksane is a SANE library interface for KDE.
libksane, KDE için bir SANE kitaplık arayüzüdür.

Source.Name: libksieve
Source.Summary: KDE PIM library for managing sieves.
Source.Description: KDE PIM library for managing sieves.

Package.Name: libksieve
Package.Summary: KDE PIM library for managing sieves.

Source.Name: libktorrent
Source.Description: ktorrent is a BitTorrent application by KDE which allows you to download files using the BitTorrent protocol.
ktorrent, KDE'nin BitTorrent protokolünü kullanarak dosya indirmenize izin veren bir BitTorrent uygulamasıdır.

Source.Name: libkvkontakte
Source.Summary: C++ library for asynchronous interaction with VK social network via its web API
Source.Description: C++ library for asynchronous interaction with VK social network via its web API

Package.Name: libkvkontakte
Package.Summary: C++ library for asynchronous interaction with VK social network via its web API

Source.Name: libmediawiki
Source.Summary: A KDE C++ interface for MediaWiki based web service as wikipedia.org
Source.Description: A KDE C++ interface for MediaWiki based web service as wikipedia.org

Package.Name: libmediawiki
Package.Summary: A KDE C++ interface for MediaWiki based web service as wikipedia.org

Source.Name: lokalize
Source.Summary: lokalize is the localization tool for KDE and other open source software
Source.Description: lokalize is also a general computer-aided translation system (CAT) with which you can translate OpenDocument files (*.odt).
lokalize, uygulamalar için kolaylıkla yerelleştirme yapabileceğiniz bir programdır.

Source.Name: mailcommon
Source.Summary: KDE PIM library providing support for mail applications
Source.Description: KDE PIM library providing support for mail applications

Source.Name: mailimporter
Source.Description: Mail importer library

Source.Name: marble
Source.Description: marble is a virtual globe and world atlas that you can use to learn more about the Earth.
marble, sanal küre ve Dünya atlası uygulamasıdır.

Source.Name: messagelib
Source.Summary: KDE PIM library providing support for mail applications
Source.Description: KDE PIM library providing support for mail applications

Source.Name: mimetreeparser
Source.Description: Parser for MIME trees
Parser for MIME trees

Source.Name: minuet
Source.Summary: A KDE Software for Music Education
Source.Description: Music education Free Software, thoughtfully designed to push your musical skills to the next level. Enhance your ability to recognize intervals, chords, rhythm, and scales while enjoying all the power of Free Software.

Package.Name: minuet
Package.Summary: A KDE Software for Music Education

Source.Name: okteta
Source.Description: Okteta is a simple editor for the raw data of files. This type of program is also called hexadecimal editor or binary editor.
Çalıştırılabilir dosyaları düzenlemeye yarayan editör.

Source.Name: okular
Source.Description: okular is a document viewer.
okular bir belge göstericidir.

Source.Name: parley
Source.Summary: parley is a program to help you memorize things.
Tekrar yapmanıza yardım eden bir uygulama
Source.Description: parley is a program to help you memorize things. parley supports many language specific features but can be used for other learning tasks just as well. It uses the spaced repetition learning method, also known as flash cards. Creating new vocabulary collections with parley is easy, but of course it is even better if you can use some of our premade files. Have a look at the KDE-Files.org page or use the "Download New Collections" feature directly in parley.

parley ile yeni öğrendiğiniz şeyleri belli zaman aralıklarıyla tekrar ederek uzun zamanlı hafızanızda yer etmelerini sağlayabilirsiniz. parley, flaş kart denilen tekniği kullanır. Dil öğrenimi için özelleşmiş yetenekleri olmasına karşın diğer konularda da kullanıma uygundur. Kartları hazırlamak epey kolay olmakla beraber kde-files.org adresinden ulaşabileceğiniz hazır kart setlerini de kullanabilirsiniz.

Source.Name: partitionmanager
Source.Summary: KDE Partition Manager is a utility program to help you manage the disk devices, partitions and file systems on your computer
Source.Description: It allows you to easily create, copy, move, delete, resize without losing data, backup and restore partitions..

KDE Disk Bölümü Yöneticisi, disklerinizi, bölümlerinizi ve dosya sistemlerinizi yönetmenize izin verir. Birçok dosya sistemini (ext2/3/4, reiserfs, NTFS, FAT32 ve daha fazlası) desteklemenin yanı sıra, yeni bölüm oluşturabilir ya da var olan bir bölüm üzerinde boyutlandırma, kopyalama, taşıma, yedekleme ve geri yükleme işlemlerini yapabilir.

Source.Name: picmi
Source.Summary: picmi is a single player logic-based puzzle game
Source.Description: picmi is a single player logic-based puzzle game. The goal is to color cells according to numbers given at the side of the board in order to uncover a hidden pattern or picture.
picmi, tablonun kenarında verilen sayılar kadar tabla üzerinde nokta koyarak bir resim tamamlama bulmacasıdır.

Source.Name: pim-data-exporter
Source.Summary: Import and export KDE PIM settings
Source.Description: Import and export KDE PIM settings

Package.Name: pim-data-exporter
Package.Summary: Import and export KDE PIM settings

Source.Name: pim-sieve-editor
Source.Description: Mail sieve editor

Source.Name: pimcommon
Source.Description: Common libraries for KDE PIM

Package.Name: pimcommon-devel
Package.Description: Contains development tools and header files for kdepim-common

Source.Name: plasma-camera
Source.Description: This application interfaces with `libcamera` directly, allowing for tighter integration with the camera stack and the implementation of hardware specific features. For a camera application that works at a higher level for simpler usecases, see [Kamoso]

Bu uygulama, `libcamera` ile doğrudan arayüz oluşturarak kamera yığınıyla daha sıkı entegrasyon ve donanıma özgü özelliklerin uygulanmasına olanak tanır. Daha basit kullanım durumları için daha üst düzeyde çalışan bir kamera uygulaması için [Kamoso]'ya bakın.

Source.Name: poxml
Source.Summary: Tools for translating DocBook XML files with Gettex
Source.Description: This is a collection of tools that facilitate translating DocBook XML files using Gettext message files (PO files).
poxml, DocBook XML dosyalarını (.po) Gettext yarımıyla çevirmeyi sağlayan bir programdır.

Source.Name: rocs
Source.Description: rocs5 aims to be a Graph Theory IDE for helping professors to show the results of a graph algorithm and also helping students to do the algorithms. rocs5 has a scripting module, done in Qt Script, that interacts with the drawn graph and every change in the graph with the script is reflected on the drawn one..

Source.Name: signon-kwallet-extension
Source.Description: kwallet signon extension

Source.Name: skanpage
Source.Summary: Utility to scan images and multi-page documents
Görüntüleri ve çok sayfalı belgeleri taramak için kullanılan yardımcı program.
Source.Description: Skanpage is a lean scanning application optimized for scanning multi-page documents. It can also scan and save single-page documents or images.
skanpage, çok sayfalı belgeleri taramak için eniyilenmiş yalın bir tarama uygulamasıdır. Ayrıca tek sayfalı belgeleri veya görselleri de tarayıp kaydedebilir.

Source.Name: step
Source.Description: step is an interactive physical simulator. It allows you to explore the physical world through simulations.

Source.Name: umbrello
Source.Summary: UML modelling tool and code generator
UML modelleme aracı ve kod üreticisi.
Source.Description: umbrello UML Modeller is a Unified Modelling Language diagram editor for KDE.
umbrello UML (Unified Modellin Language) modelleme ve diyagram editörüdür.
